properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You told me to love Somebody like I love myself You call me to do these Things with You I won't fail I can do the impossible, Reach the unreachable You provide miracles everyday I surrender it all there's Power in Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You love me, and I love You, You are for me, I believe You God You got me, And I trust You, I trust you With You I can roar Like a lion, face the giants Walk through the fire Cause I know You're with me Jesus, I trust You, I trust You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I won't deny the grace You have for me Oh, Jesus your love Is sweet it sets me free Nothing's impossible, Love is unstoppable I'm seeing miracles everyday I surrender it all there's Power in Your name Your mighty name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm gonna trust You right now, Right now, right now I'm gonna trust You right now, Right now, right now I'm gonna trust You right now, Right now, right now I'm gonna trust You right now, Right now, right now

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, You love me, and I love You, You are for me, I believe You God You got me, And I trust You, I trust You With You I can roar like a lion, Face the giants Walk through the fire cause I know You're with me Jesus, I trust you, I trust you I trust you, Jesus
